name: harn-dev-tools
description: Local development tooling for the Harn repository

scripts.portal:ui: npm run portal:ensure-deps && npm --prefix crates/harn-cli/portal run dev
scripts.portal:build: npm run portal:ensure-deps && npm --prefix crates/harn-cli/portal run build
scripts.portal:lint: npm run portal:ensure-deps && npm --prefix crates/harn-cli/portal run lint
scripts.portal:test: npm run portal:ensure-deps && npm --prefix crates/harn-cli/portal test
